tasks_completed.title: DIAG: 12772 cointegration Q08 INFRA persists after recompile
tasks_completed.verdict: INFRA root cause confirmed: USDJPY standard tester-cache (.hcs) absent from T5/T6-T9 during Jul 4-5 Q08 runs. MT5 requests standard USDJPY for USD P&L conversion of JPY-pair positions; live sync timed out aborting the test with 0 completed trades (not an EA code defect — basket pattern, symbol slots, Q08 stream emission all verified correct). Fix: seeded USDJPY 2016-2025 .hcs files to T6-T9 from T5. Q08 already pending requeue. Next run expected to complete with non-zero trades.

side_fixes.detail: _persist_durable_sleeve_stream (introduced in 7c1976bb3) uses shutil.copyfile but shutil was never imported. Would crash at runtime for basket EAs. Fixed in 54464616b on main.

infrastructure_ops.detail: Copied USDJPY 2016-2025 .hcs (10 files, ~17MB total) from T5 to T6/T7/T8/T9 Darwinex-Live tester bases. T10 has no Darwinex-Live bases dir (not in active rotation). T1-T5 already had USDJPY downloaded by prior Q08 run sync attempts.

commits_to_main: 54464616b: fix(q08): add missing import shutil in aggregate.py
029df3d4c: ops(diag): QM5_12772 Q08 INFRA root cause -- USDJPY tester-cache gap
notes: Previous Codex cycle (July 5 ~16:00 local) produced 7c1976bb3 (basket host-sym path fix) and 45d4c6174 (timeout 2400→5400s). Those fixes addressed the SECONDARY issue (q08_trades path mismatch, timeout for multi-symbol runs). This cycle diagnosed the PRIMARY issue (USDJPY conversion history gap) that caused 0-trade results. Both fix layers are now on main. Next Q08 run for 12772 should clear both blockers.
